tweets.text:
im never going to prioritize airdrops over what i believe is best for token price, if you're only holding bc you think you're going to get an airdrop then you should sell now

I will distribute supply fairly, over time, to the people who contribute the most to the network and are long-term aligned, so you should not be concerned if you plan on holding for a long time and contributing value, if you just want coins now to market sell then you should buy something else

thread_tweets.text:
well the reason i had the team build https://t.co/bcooKtvatf is because i didnt want to airdrop supply to people who just dusted a lot of empty wallets, i would rather airdrop to real people who are also posting about the coin, building products around the coin, doing educational content, IRL content etc etc - so this allows me to track people's holding time + X impressions and other things, and you can import multiple wallets

am aware some people don't want to import their keys so we're working on something for that but current iteration works well as is
thread_tweets.full_text:
well the reason i had the team build https://t.co/bcooKtvatf is because i didnt want to airdrop supply to people who just dusted a lot of empty wallets, i would rather airdrop to real people who are also posting about the coin, building products around the coin, doing educational content, IRL content etc etc - so this allows me to track people's holding time + X impressions and other things, and you can import multiple wallets

am aware some people don't want to import their keys so we're working on something for that but current iteration works well as is
